title: MyFigureCollection full site rip (2023-03-09 99.97% complete)
description:
An almost complete rip of MyFigureCollection from when they started to remove all loli content.  
There are still 853 images missing, which we failed to recover in some way or another. The list of image URLs for them is in the torrent.
Not all of the missing images are "NSFW+"/loli content, some are also images for listings. The metadata for them can be found in `pictures.json`.

Fuck MFC and may a better site take its place.

# Contents of this torrent

A database of metadata and all the pictures we managed to download.  
The database contains the following metadata:
- Tags
- Items
  An item is a page for something like a figurine, doujinshi, or other type of merch.
- Item categories
- Entries
  An entry is essentially a wiki entry on something related to items.
- Entry categories
- Picture metadata
  Pictures are user uploaded photos of an item.

The rest are user uploaded pictures, and thumbnails for items and entries.  
There's also some sample code in C# to get you started with parsing the JSON data.

# Missing information in the ReadMe

I forgot to mention in the ReadMe that thumbnails follow the naming convention of `{id}_thumb.jpg`,  
where `{id}` is the ID of the item in `items.json` or the ID of the enty in `entries.json`.
